summary: Iteration 23 — FRONTEND-ONLY E2E launch-readiness regression per E1's request. All 15 targeted features pass (30/30 checks). New Live Integration Check page (/admin/qa/live-check) is fully wired: Razorpay + MSG91 + Recent Webhook events cards render, Create ₹1 test order returns 'MOCK · mock_ord_568738f2156e4281' inline, MSG91 dry-run shows 'Dev mode: dispatched code 424242 (no real SMS sent)' toast, and the left-rail 'Live Check' link (data-testid=admin-nav-livecheck) navigates correctly. AdminQA /admin/qa Run BRV still returns Pass/Fail matrix. AdminPrograms 'Featured on Home' + 'Payment mode' dropdown present in dialog. AdminUsers has search, red delete icon, emerald Export CSV button, per-row indigo Preview button (icon-only, data-testid=admin-user-preview-RW######). AdminSystem Backups tab has 'Create backup' btn; Danger Zone tab opens the 3-step wipe wizard (data-testid=danger-empty-open). User login (seeded RW829163 mobile 9147207437 / Passw0rd!) lands on /app/home which renders activity meter + continue learning + featured sections. All 7 user-shell pages (/home /programs /refer /team /notifications /profile /payment-history) load with no crashes or console errors. Logout goes to /welcome. PWA manifest.json + service-worker.js both serve 200.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminLiveCheck.jsx line 168: `Row label='Webhook URLs' value={rzp.webhook_url_hint}` — value is rendered inside a right-aligned span with font-mono text-[11px] and can visually overflow the card on narrow widths because it packs two URLs separated by ' · '. Consider `truncate` or `break-all` for defensive layout. Not blocking.

AdminLiveCheck.jsx line 234: label text says 'Send test OTP (code 424242)' — the actual code in dev mode is 123456 per test_credentials.md (OTP_DEV_MODE=true). The label's 424242 refers to the LIVE-mode SMS payload while /auth/verify-otp accepts 123456 in dev. Slightly misleading in a mock preview; add a note like '(dev flows still accept 123456)' or gate the label on sms.otp_dev_mode. Cosmetic only, no functional impact.
AdminLiveCheck.jsx line 261: `<Badge variant='secondary' data-testid='webhook-count'>{events.length}</Badge>` — Badge is not aria-labelled; a screen reader hears just the number. Minor a11y polish.

AdminUsers per-row Preview button is icon-only (`title='Preview app as this user'`) — the review request calls it 'indigo Preview button' but there is no visible text label. If you want it to be self-labelling, add sr-only text or a visible label on wider viewports. Current impl is fine but not verifiable via text-based selectors — testers must use `[data-testid^=admin-user-preview-]`.

AdminSystem Danger Zone: primary CTA is 'Empty app data' (data-testid=danger-empty-open) — the review request calls it 'wipe wizard' which is correct semantically. Naming is fine, just note the mismatch so future testing agents know to use the testid.
PreviewBanner (impersonation) not shown in this run because admin was not impersonating. Not exercised; if E1 wants coverage, seed an impersonation session and re-run.

success_rate.backend: not tested (skipped per E1 request; 9/9 live-check pytests + 59/59 batch regression already green)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (30/30 UI checks pass across Live Check, QA/BRV, Programs, Users, System/Backups+Danger, and full user shell)

test_credentials: Admin 9999999999 / Admin@12345. User: mobile 9147207437 / Passw0rd! (RW829163, seeded in iter22, still active).
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created this run. Live Check webhook events list shows 5 pre-existing 'payment.captured' events (seeded from earlier iterations). Left in place — they demonstrate the webhook wiring works.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend E2E for launch readiness is GREEN. If E1 wants to add coverage: (a) live impersonation flow to verify PreviewBanner rendering, (b) full user register flow with dev OTP 123456 + referral RW000000 (was not repeated this iteration since seeded user already exists), (c) actual mock payment purchase flow to prove /payments/verify + purchase creation + payment-history population. Testids proven in this run: admin-live-check-page, live-check-razorpay-card, live-check-msg91-card, live-check-webhook-card, rzp-test-order-btn, rzp-test-order-result, rzp-test-order-detail, msg91-mobile-input, msg91-send-btn, webhook-count, webhook-refresh, admin-nav-livecheck, sys-tab-backups, sys-tab-danger, danger-empty-open, admin-user-preview-RW*, admin-users-export, admin-users-apply, admin-shell-logout. Two 'failures' in the raw log (Preview button, Wipe button) were selector-only issues in the test script — the actual UI is present and correct; do NOT ask E1 to fix them.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found. The two initial 'FAIL' lines in the raw test output were false negatives caused by text-based selectors (`button:has-text('Preview')`, `button:has-text('Wipe')`). The real UI uses icon-only buttons with `title` attributes and different label copy ('Empty app data'). Second-pass inspection with data-testid selectors confirmed both features work: Preview buttons render one per user row (162 testids total on Users page, all admin-user-preview-RW######), and the Danger Zone wipe wizard opens a 'Confirm — step 1 of 3' AlertDialog with Cancel + 'I understand, continue' actions.
